title: Default Table Sort
excerpt: We have a list of tasks sorted by priority - and we have saved priority as the default sort.   However as soon as you add a new task - the new task just stays where it is (either the top or the bottom) and the sort by pr…

posts.author: skelly (Shane Kelly)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have a list of tasks sorted by priority - and we have saved priority as the default sort. However as soon as you add a new task - the new task just stays where it is (either the top or the bottom) and the sort by priority is lost.

The only work around is to manually resort the list every single time we add a task (which we aren’t going to do)

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Shane,
You could maybe use the filter feature and save the view each time after adding a new task. It should help maintain the desired sort order
Cheers,
Harsh
